/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/Cellar/sfml/3.0.2/lib -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system CMakeFiles/RosMonDockPet.dir/runros_sfml_dockpet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RosMonDockPet.dir/MacWindowUtils.mm.o -o RosMonDockPet.app/Contents/MacOS/RosMonDockPet  -lsfml-graphics -lsfml-window -lsfml-system -framework Cocoa -framework OpenGL spine-cpp-build/libspine-cpp.a
